title: Date Range Picker Filter for Reports and Dashboards
story: As a data analyst browsing reports, I want to filter reports and dashboards by created and last modified date using a date range picker, so that I can quickly find reports from a specific time period.
description:
Adds a date range picker component to the Reports tab for filtering by Created and Last Modified dates. The component follows the daterangepicker.com pattern with predefined ranges (Today, Yesterday, Last 7 Days, etc.) and a custom date range option.

The picker provides an intuitive calendar-based UI for selecting date ranges, matching modern web application conventions.
acceptance_criteria: Date range picker is available on the Reports tab for Created and Last Modified date columns
Predefined ranges are available (Today, Yesterday, Last 7 Days, Last 30 Days, This Month, Last Month)
Custom date range selection via calendar UI is supported
Selecting a date range filters the report list in real time
Clear filter option resets date range selection
ux_changes: Added a date range picker component to the Reports tab. Users can select predefined ranges or a custom date range via a calendar popup to filter reports by Created or Last Modified date.
implementation_notes: Date range picker follows the daterangepicker.com example pattern. Purely a frontend filtering feature.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented the date range picker and shared a screenshot of the implementation. Ryan approved the design.
